name: suitesforall
description: SuitesForAll — single-file admin tool for multi-building office floor plans. This package.json exists ONLY to wire up the test gates; the app itself is the inline-script HTML at floor-map-editor.html and has no npm dependencies. The functions/ folder has its own package.json for the Firebase Cloud Functions runtime — keep them separate.

scripts.parse-check: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const html=fs.readFileSync('floor-map-editor.html','utf8');const re=/<script\b([^>]*)>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/gi;let m,idx=0,fail=0;while((m=re.exec(html))!==null){idx++;const attrs=m[1]||'';if(/\bsrc=/.test(attrs))continue;if(/\btype=\"(?!text\/javascript|module|application\/javascript)/.test(attrs))continue;try{new Function(m[2]);}catch(e){fail++;console.error('Block #'+idx+' FAILED: '+e.message);}}console.log('Inline scripts checked: '+idx+', failures: '+fail);process.exit(fail?1:0);"
